message:
perf: use socket timeout instead of polling for WebSocket I/O

- Add setReadTimeout() to use SO_RCVTIMEO instead of Thread.sleep polling
- Reads return immediately when data arrives, timeout only for shutdown check
- Add event_loop.zig with kqueue (macOS) and epoll (Linux) support
- Fix auth token generation: 32→30 bytes to fit base64 in 44-byte token
